items.title: What can be done to stop price gouging during the fuel crisis?
items.summary: Fuel prices have spiked, and so have concerns and complaints about alleged price gouging. Are retailers cashing in on the crisis?

items.title: Erol has long waited for rules to change. Today, he finally gave whole blood
items.summary: "This is a very meaningful time for us to feel viscerally that we are more included within society," Erol Dalkic said.

items.title: Eight children killed in Louisiana domestic violence related shooting, police say

items.title: 'One thing after another': The almost $20,000 penalty for being single in Australia
items.summary: Being single comes at a "premium" in Australia, leaving those not in a relationship thousands of dollars worse off.

items.title: Over 60 per cent of popular Cheaper Home Batteries Program installations 'substandard'

items.title: Twenty protesters arrested for violating Queensland's ban on pro-Palestinian phrases
items.summary: Those who recite or display "from the river to the sea" or "globalise the intifada" in Queensland can face up to two years' jail.

items.summary: The prime minister also said that "Australia stands ready to support efforts to restore stability and security" in the strait.
